heroKicker: Backend Engineer & Tech Lead — Agentic AI
heroSub: Multi-agent workflows, LLM orchestration, and RAG-powered tools — built on scalable Python and Go backends that turn AI capabilities into business automation that actually ships.
builtBody: Systems designed to be operated, not just demoed — owned architecture, maintainable backends, and AI workflows that hold up under real load and real business needs.
contactBody: If you're building something where AI has to actually ship — an agent layer, an automation pipeline, a backend platform — I'd like to hear about it.
